headline: This release delivers major dashboard and API speed improvements, a streamlined two-step signup, and in-context guidance that helps new users find value faster.

themes.user_facing_summary: Dashboards now load up to 67% faster, and workspace member listings are significantly snappier — especially for teams with 50 or more members. Smarter caching and query optimizations reduce server load across the board.
supporting_changes: Reduce dashboard p95 latency from 2.4s to 800ms via DB call batching
Add Redis caching layer to org-settings API
Eliminate N+1 query in workspace member listing endpoint

themes.user_facing_summary: Getting started is now faster: signup drops from five steps to two, and optional profile details can be filled in after you're up and running. A new set of in-context tooltips on the first-run dashboard surfaces the four metrics new users care about most.
supporting_changes: Add inline tooltips on first-run dashboard for top 4 metrics
Defer non-essential profile fields to post-signup

notable_changes: Dashboard 95th-percentile load time cut from 2.4s to ~800ms — directly addressing the top complaint from the Q2 NPS survey.
Workspace member listing is ~30% faster for teams with 50–200 members after removing an N+1 query.
Signup abandonment reduced by eliminating three of the five prior signup steps.
API quickstart documentation updated to reflect the new auth model, reducing integration friction for developers getting started.
customer_voice: Customers flagged a sluggish dashboard as the top Q2 NPS complaint, reported signup abandonment mid-flow, and asked for better in-app guidance for new users — this release addresses all three directly, alongside documentation improvements that lower the barrier for API integration.
